tweets.full_text: BREAKING: Super Micro Computer co-founder charged for allegedly smuggling $25 billion of NVIDIA GPUs to China, holds $464M in Super Micro shares.
tweets.summary_zh: 突发：超微电脑联合创始人因向中国走私价值250亿美元的NVIDIA GPU被逮捕，持有4.64亿美元Super Micro股份

tweets.full_text: I spoke to Anthropic AI agent Claude about AI collecting massive amounts of personal data and how that information is being used to violate our privacy rights.
tweets.summary_zh: 桑德斯参议员与Anthropic的Claude AI对话，讨论AI大规模收集个人数据及隐私保护问题

tweets.full_text: Claude Code just shipped Channels preview - supports Telegram and Discord, lets you control Claude Code conversations from your phone.
tweets.summary_zh: Claude Code 发布了 Channels 预览版，支持 Telegram 和 Discord，可用手机远程控制 Claude Code 会话

tweets.full_text: Kimi congratulates Cursor on shipping Composer 2. Kimi-k2.5 powers Composer 2 under the hood.
tweets.summary_zh: Kimi 祝贺 Cursor 发布 Composer 2，其底层模型 Kimi-k2.5 为 Composer 2 提供支持

tweets.full_text: Using ChatGPT to write prompts for Claude. The AI nesting doll debate is here.
tweets.summary_zh: 用 ChatGPT 帮写给 Claude 的 prompt，AI 之间的套娃使用引发热议

tweets.full_text: Introducing Claude Search - Claude can now search the web with the latest Artifacts update.
tweets.summary_zh: 介绍 Claude Search——Claude 现在可以通过最新 Artifacts 更新进行网页搜索

tweets.full_text: People are using AI to generate their dating profiles. The future of online dating is here.
tweets.summary_zh: 人们用 AI 生成约会档案，在线约会的未来已来

tweets.full_text: The state of people after switching from ChatGPT to Claude (comedy video).
tweets.summary_zh: 从 ChatGPT 切换到 Claude 之后人的状态变化（搞笑视频）

tweets.full_text: The bottleneck is no longer writing code. It is understanding what to build. AI handles syntax, you handle strategy.
tweets.summary_zh: 瓶颈不再是写代码，而是理解要构建什么。AI 处理语法，你负责战略

tweets.full_text: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang wearing leather jacket at GTC keynote. Announces next-gen Blackwell Ultra architecture.
tweets.summary_zh: NVIDIA CEO 黄仁勋在 GTC 主题演讲中宣布下一代 Blackwell Ultra 架构

tweets.full_text: OpenAI roadmap: make ChatGPT the best coding + knowledge work tool first, then build truly personal assistant.
tweets.summary_zh: OpenAI 路线图：先把 ChatGPT 做成最强的 coding 和知识工作入口，再做成真正懂你的个人助手

tweets.full_text: Gemini on Android voice input no longer cuts you off when you pause. iOS version coming soon.
tweets.summary_zh: Gemini 在 Android 上语音输入时不再因为停顿就抢着打断你，iOS 版也快到了

tweets.full_text: Design exploration and generating production apps are becoming one pipeline. Click Build and ship.
tweets.summary_zh: 设计探索和生成成品 App 正在连成一条链路，点一下 Build 就能直接产出可上线应用

tweets.full_text: Employees who can use AI agents will have access to increasing compute budgets. This will spread to all knowledge work.
tweets.summary_zh: 会用 AI agents 的员工，未来拿到的算力预算只会越来越高，而且这会从工程扩散到所有知识工作岗位

tweets.full_text: Next.js 16.2 is going agent-native with AGENTS.md, versioned docs, and dedicated browser tools.
tweets.summary_zh: Next.js 16.2 开始明显往 agent-native 走，用 AGENTS.md、版本文档和专用浏览器工具

tweets.full_text: Building AI products: ship in short cycles, prototype first, models upgrade and break old features anyway.
tweets.summary_zh: 做 AI 产品要短周期推进，先做原型和 eval，模型一升级就重看旧功能

tweets.full_text: Agent systems get more complex, more cascading failures. Start simple. After model updates, retry hard features.
tweets.summary_zh: agent 系统越复杂越容易连锁出错，所以先做最简单可行的方案；模型更新后，也要把以前太难的功能重新拿出来试

tweets.full_text: New workflow: product requirements meeting done, Replit can build MVP through Granola MCP immediately.
tweets.summary_zh: 新工作流：产品需求会一开完，Replit 就能通过 Granola MCP 直接开始搭 MVP
